Module chariot
Package chariot.api

Interface AccountAuth

All Superinterfaces:
Account
public interface AccountAuth extends Account
Read and write account information and preferences.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface chariot.api.Account

    Account.UriAndToken, Account.UriAndTokenExchange
